zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzAlan of Arundel於1378年3月出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel32歲，母親Elizabeth de Bohun28歲。她去世於1415年10月13日之前在英國英格蘭哈普爾布洛肯爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzAlan of Arundel于1378年3月出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel32岁，母亲Elizabeth de Bohun28岁。她去世于1415年10月13日之前在英国英格兰哈普爾布洛肯爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzAlan of Arundel was born in March 1378, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth de Bohun, was 28. She died before 13 October 1415, in Brockenhurst, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzAlan of Arundel est née en mars 1378, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Bohun, avait 28 ans. Elle est décédée avant 13 octobre 1415, à Brockenhurst, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzAlan of Arundel im März 1378 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Bohun 28. Sie starb vor 13. Oktober 1415 in Brockenhurst, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzAlan of Arundel è nata il nel marzo 1378 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Bohun, aveva 28 anni. Morì prima del 13 ottobre 1415, nel Brockenhurst, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzAlan of Arundelが1378年3月にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundelは32歳，母Elizabeth de Bohunは28歳であった。彼女は1415年10月13日以前にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアブロクエンハルストで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzAlan of Arundel(이)가 1378년 3월 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Bohun(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1415년 10월 13일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 브록후르스트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzAlan of Arundel nasceu em março de 1378, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Bohun, tinha 28 anos. Ela faleceu antes 13 de outubro de 1415, em Brockenhurst, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzAlan of Arundel родилась марта 1378 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Bohun, 28. Она умерла перед 13 октябрь 1415 г. в местности броккенурст, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió antes de 13 de octubre de 1415, en Brockenhurst, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
